title: HU-GAM-01 — Award Points for Donation
user_story: As a registered user, I want to earn points when I donate an item, so that I feel rewarded and motivated to reuse items.
detailed_description: When a user completes a donation action, the system should calculate and assign points based on the item category. The system must enforce a daily limit of points and prevent invalid actions from awarding points.
acceptance_criteria: Points are awarded when a valid donation is completed
Points are not awarded if the donation action is invalid
User total points are updated correctly
The system prevents awarding points with non-positive values

backend: Function under test: award_points(user_id, action, points_to_add, repo)
Repository dependency: points_repo with get_points_today, add_points, get_total_points
database: No real database access in unit tests

testing_notes: Focus on business rules and validation
